signals.headline: RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed on XRPL & Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed on XRPL & Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The official full-scale rollout of Ripple USD (RLUSD) stablecoin across the XRP Ledger and Ethereum has been confirmed as of April 18, 2026, driving massive capital influx, record XRPL transaction volume, and XRP surges amid resolved SEC battle and nearing XRP ETF approvals.[1]

signals.headline: US Spot XRP ETFs Reach ~$1B AUM with Strong Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US Spot XRP ETFs Reach ~$1B AUM with Strong Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Six US spot XRP ETFs (Canary XRPC, Bitwise, Franklin Templeton, Grayscale, 21Shares, Amplify) now hold ~$1B AUM and 787M XRP in custody as of mid-April 2026, with $119.6M inflows week-ending April 11—the strongest since December 2025—fueling institutional adoption.[3]

signals.headline: Rakuten Wallet Launches XRP Support for 44M Users in Japan | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Rakuten Wallet Launches XRP Support for 44M Users in Japan | YES | HIGH confidence**  
On April 15, 2026, Rakuten Wallet listed XRP as an asset and payment method, enabling conversion of 3 trillion loyalty points ($23B value) to XRP across 44M users and 5M merchants, coinciding with XRP's first 2026 touch of $1.50 intraday high on April 17.[3]
